object_under_evaluation: reviewable integrity of witness trace exports on bounded runs
claim_boundary: This report speaks only to whether the public witness trace stayed reviewable enough for bounded downstream use on this case family.
limitations: It does not grade final outcome quality.
It does not prove runtime telemetry completeness.

case_notes.trace_note: Meaningful route steps, tool use, and one external effect stayed visible in order.
case_notes.summary_boundary_note: The markdown summary stayed weaker than the trace and preserved the same bounded limits.
case_notes.next_inspection_target: Check whether later redaction variants keep the same state_delta clarity.

case_notes.trace_note: The route remained reviewable under redaction, but one materially used tool appeared only in the summary.
case_notes.summary_boundary_note: The summary remained bounded, yet it looked slightly cleaner than the visible tool path supported.
case_notes.next_inspection_target: Inspect the missing tool-visibility segment before reusing this trace downstream.

major_review_flags: One case hid materially relevant tool use from the public trace.
State-delta wording remained uneven across the family.
